description: define and solve custom unconstrained + constrained ElementwiseProblems with NSGA-II (read-only)
rules: read-only — solves user-defined problems and writes a report; mutates nothing remote or live
runs the vendored custom_problem_example.py core (two ElementwiseProblems, NSGA-II) via python3
forces MPLBACKEND=Agg so the Scatter plots never block
captures stdout (solution counts, feasibility, objective-space ranges) to record_store/custom_problem.txt
requires the pymoo package at run time; degrades to an empty {} report if it is absent
limitation: The vendored core defines its own bi-objective unconstrained and constrained problems; vars document intent. Needs the pymoo library installed to produce real results.
